mapper.insert: INSERT INTO campingCar(carNum, carName, carSize, thumbnail, discountRate, carShow, reg_date, rev_date, carMaxNum, sleepNum, content, petOrNot, description) VALUES (#{carNum}, #{carName}, #{carSize}, #{thumbnail}, #{discountRate}, #{carShow}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{carMaxNum}, #{sleepNum}, #{content}, #{petOrNot}, #{description})
INSERT INTO carDetail(caravanNum, weekCost, wkndCost, carBirth, carNum) VALUES (#{caravanNum}, #{weekCost}, #{wkndCost}, #{carBirth}, #{carNum})

INSERT INTO carOption(caravanNum, toilet, shower, bed, sink, microwave, frige, waterHeater, desk, tv, airCondition, heater, powerBank, induction, gasStove) VALUES (#{caravanNum}, #{toilet}, #{shower}, #{bed}, #{sink}, #{microwave}, #{frige}, #{waterHeater}, #{desk}, #{tv}, #{airCondition}, #{heater}, #{powerBank}, #{induction}, #{gasStove})
INSERT INTO addImagefile(carImagenum, imageFilename, caravanNum) VALUES(carImagenum_seq.NEXTVAL, #{imageFilename}, #{caravanNum})
